glosses.ro: a fi de acord; a aproba
glosses.ja: 同意する; 承認する

translations.en: I can agree to the proposal.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể đồng ý với đề xuất này.
translations.nl: Ik kan met het voorstel instemmen.
translations.hi: मैं प्रस्ताव से सहमत हो सकता हूँ.
translations.pl: Mogę się zgodzić na tę propozycję.
translations.el: Μπορώ να συμφωνήσω με την πρόταση.
translations.da: Jeg kan gå med på forslaget.
translations.ja: その提案に同意できます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 1st person singular; selects a bare infinitive complement ('zustimmen') expressing ability.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; marks the dative object required by 'zustimmen'.
Common noun, masculine, singular, dative; complement to 'zustimmen' (verb that governs dative).
Bare infinitive main verb selected by the modal 'kann'; separable verb (prefix 'zu-'), not split here; governs a dative object.

translations.en: You want to agree with my idea.
translations.es: Quieres estar de acuerdo con mi idea.
translations.fr: Tu veux être d'accord avec mon idée.
translations.it: Vuoi essere d'accordo con la mia idea.
translations.ko: 너는 내 아이디어에 동의하고 싶어 해.
translations.ru: Ты хочешь согласиться с моей идеей.
translations.pt: Você quer concordar com a minha ideia.
translations.vi: Bạn muốn đồng ý với ý tưởng của tôi.
translations.nl: Je wilt meegaan met mijn idee.
translations.uk: Ти хочеш погодитися з моєю ідеєю.
translations.hi: तुम मेरी सोच से सहमत होना चाहते हो.
translations.pl: Chcesz zgodzić się z moim pomysłem.
translations.el: Θέλεις να συμφωνήσεις με την ιδέα μου.
translations.nb: Du vil være enig i ideen min.
translations.sv: Du vill gå med på min idé.
translations.ro: Vrei să fii de acord cu ideea mea.
translations.da: Du vil gå med på min idé.
translations.ja: あなたは私のアイデアに賛成したいです。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 2nd person singular; selects a bare infinitive ('zustimmen') expressing volition.
Possessive determiner, dative feminine singular; agrees with 'Idee' and marks the dative object of 'zustimmen'.
Common noun, feminine, singular, dative; complement to 'zustimmen' (verb that governs dative).
Bare infinitive main verb selected by the modal 'willst'; separable verb (prefix 'zu-'), not split here; governs a dative object.

translations.es: Probablemente ella no esté de acuerdo.
translations.fr: Elle ne sera probablement pas d'accord.
translations.vi: Có lẽ cô ấy sẽ không đồng ý.
translations.nl: Ze zal waarschijnlijk niet akkoord gaan.
translations.nb: Hun vil sannsynligvis ikke være enig.
translations.id: Kemungkinan besar dia tidak akan setuju.
translations.sv: Hon kommer troligen inte att hålla med.
translations.ro: Probabil că ea nu va fi de acord.
translations.da: Hun vil sandsynligvis ikke være enig.
translations.fi: Hän ei todennäköisesti ole samaa mieltä.
translations.ja: 彼女はたぶん同意しないでしょう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; forms future-like construction with infinitive 'zustimmen'.
Sentence adverb expressing likelihood; modifies the clause.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate, negating 'zustimmen'.
Infinitive main verb selected by the auxiliary 'wird'; separable verb (prefix 'zu-'), not split here; typically governs a dative object (implicit).

translations.en: Everyone has to agree by tomorrow.
translations.es: Todos tienen que estar de acuerdo a más tardar mañana.
translations.fr: Tout le monde doit être d'accord d'ici demain.
translations.it: Tutti devono essere d'accordo entro domani.
translations.zh-Hans: 所有人必须在明天之前同意。
translations.yue: 大家要喺聽日之前同意。
translations.vi: Mọi người phải đồng ý trước ngày mai.
translations.ar: على الجميع أن يوافقوا بحلول الغد.
translations.nl: Iedereen moet vóór morgen akkoord gaan.
translations.hi: सबको कल तक सहमत होना है.
translations.pl: Wszyscy muszą się zgodzić do jutra.
translations.el: Όλοι πρέπει να συμφωνήσουν μέχρι αύριο.
translations.nb: Alle må være enige innen i morgen.
translations.id: Semua orang harus setuju sebelum besok.
translations.sv: Alla måste vara överens senast imorgon.
translations.ro: Toată lumea trebuie să fie de acord până mâine.
translations.da: Alle skal være enige inden i morgen.
translations.fi: Kaikkien täytyy olla samaa mieltä viimeistään huomenna.
translations.ja: みんなは明日までに同意しなければなりません。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite pronoun, nominative plural; subject of the clause.
Finite modal auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person plural; selects a bare infinitive ('zustimmen') expressing necessity.
Preposition introducing a temporal phrase; combines with 'morgen' to form 'bis morgen' ('by/until tomorrow').
Temporal adverb; complement of the preposition 'bis' forming a temporal PP.
Bare infinitive main verb selected by the modal 'müssen'; separable verb (prefix 'zu-'), not split here; typically governs a dative object (not expressed).
